steps.title: Spot what the question specifically asks
steps.content: The question asks to describe a color from 2021 London Fashion Week — this requires a direct statement of that color and its identifying properties, not a comparison with other years or a generalization about Fashion Weeks.

steps.title: Match the requested description
steps.content: D directly names the 2021 London color and states its properties: stirring ocean blue, cool, and bright. A and B don't isolate the 2021 London color specifically; C includes related information but frames it through contrast with 2018 rather than as a direct description. That matches choice D — D is correct.
